description: Multiple ways in which arthropods exploit plants, plant traits that deter or augment insects, environmental mediation of these interactions, effects on population dynamics, community ecology and co-evolution, and implications to natural resource management, environmental quality, and sustainable development.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: F&W ECOL/​BOTANY/​ZOOLOGY  460,F&W ECOL/​ENTOM  500,ENTOM/​BOTANY/​PL PATH  505, or graduate/professional standing
